name: THE FINALS
searchHints: "THE FINALS" current active season number name start end date
"THE FINALS" season launch patch notes official Embark

seasons.description: The current season introduces Fantasy League, adding the Aerialist playstyle, ranked tournament improvements, broad quality-of-life changes, and a medieval fantasy theme across the Arena.
Season 9 introduced Dragon Rising, World Tour 2.0 progression, seasonal rewards, and the start of year 3 of THE FINALS.
Season 8 launched with the Game Time update, expanded tutorials, improved onboarding, refreshed seasonal progression, and a new wave of content and balance changes.
Season 7 focused on improving the new-player experience, cheaper unlocks, new seasonal content, and the debut of NOZOMI/CITADEL and the breach-themed seasonal arc.
Season 6 brought new ways to compete, an updated arsenal, new sponsor-driven progression, and a more frequent balance cadence for the live service.
Season 5 celebrated one year of THE FINALS, expanded platform support, refreshed progression, and continued the game's evolving ranked and live-service systems.
Season 4 reintroduced Ranked Cashout as the core ranked mode, added Fortune Stadium, and delivered new weapons, gadgets, and a more polished tournament experience.
Season 3 introduced Kyoto 1568, World Tour, Terminal Attack as the ranked mode, new weapons, and a Japan-inspired Battle Pass.
Season 2 brought a CNS-themed takeover, new gadgets, new weapons, a fresh Battle Pass, and major meta changes to classes and modes.
The launch season of THE FINALS introduced Las Vegas, the first Battle Pass, live-service progression, and the first competitive seasonal cycle.
